sections.heading: What is Performance Monitoring & Metrics?
sections.body: Lighthouse, Web Vitals, performance budgets, and monitoring tools. This lesson covers the essential concepts you need to understand to get started effectively.

sections.heading: Key Concepts
sections.body:
Performance Monitoring & Metrics is a fundamental concept that every developer needs to master. Here are the core ideas:

1. Core Principle: The main idea behind Performance Monitoring & Metrics is understanding how different components work together.

2. Application: In practice, you'll use Performance Monitoring & Metrics every day when building applications. It's one of those skills that becomes second nature.

3. Common Patterns: Most Performance Monitoring & Metrics implementations follow predictable patterns. Once you recognize them, you can apply them quickly.

sections.heading: Why This Matters
sections.body: Understanding Performance Monitoring & Metrics is crucial because it builds the foundation for everything that follows. Master this topic and you'll find subsequent concepts much easier to learn.
